name: Property Detail
description: Full property view with details, gallery, metrics, units, financials, documents, and maintenance history.

view.description: Full property detail view with tabs

slots.header: Property name, address, edit button, back link
slots.metrics: Key metrics row (occupancy, revenue, expenses, NOI)
slots.tabs: Overview, Units, Financials, Documents, Maintenance tabs

create.description: Create or edit property form with address, type, unit count fields, and image upload area

visual_brief: Full property view starting with a header showing property name, address, status badge, and action buttons (Edit, Archive). Below the header, a photo gallery as a horizontal scrollable strip or grid of thumbnails. A metrics row shows key stats: total units, occupancy rate, monthly revenue, NOI. The main content area uses horizontal tabs: Overview (property details and description), Units (unit list), Financials (income/expense summaries), Documents (lease PDFs, insurance), and Maintenance (ticket list). The create preset replaces display fields with an input form.

responsive.mobile: Single-column layout. Gallery becomes a swipeable carousel. Tabs become a dropdown selector or horizontally scrollable. Content sections stack fully.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout with scrollable tab bar. Gallery shows 3-4 thumbnails. Content area comfortable width.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with all tabs visible. Gallery shows full thumbnail row. Content area can show side-by-side panels within tabs.
